inputs.label: Weapon Damage Dice Average
inputs.businessContext: Average damage from weapon dice (e.g., d8=4.5)

inputs.label: Ability Modifier
inputs.businessContext: Strength or Dexterity modifier applied to damage

inputs.label: Proficiency Bonus
inputs.businessContext: Bonus added to attack rolls, not damage, but used for certain features

inputs.label: Critical Hit Chance (%)
inputs.businessContext: Probability of scoring a critical hit (normally 5%)

inputs.label: Extra Damage Dice Average
inputs.businessContext: Average damage from extra dice (e.g., sneak attack, smite)

inputs.label: Damage Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for vulnerabilities or resistances (e.g., 0.5 for resistance)
